text: `LlmCallRow`/`NewLlmCall` (llm_calls.rs): `id: i64`, `session_id: String`, `window_hash: String`, `provider: String`, `model: String`, `system_prompt: String`, `transcript_slice: String`, `raw_response: String`, `parsed_title: Option<String>`, `parsed_activity: Option<String>`, `created_at: i64` (passed in, never clock-read).
